positive: Minimalist geometric illustration of a celestial journey: a crescent moon hugging a stylized rocket taking off, surrounded by orbiting planets and scattered constellations. Use clean, thick black linework and negative space principles. The color palette should be limited to deep indigo, gold foil accents, and matte white background. Composition must be centralized and balanced, ideal for a repeating apparel pattern or single chest print. Vector art quality, high contrast, elegant silhouette, inspired by Art Deco and modern scientific diagrams. Clean lines, graphic novel style, crisp edges.
